problem id: c825ac2a
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(6) XOR SHR(5)

examples:
  11001000 -> 00000110
  10101011 -> 11000101
  11101111 -> 11000111
  10010111 -> 11000100
  00111100 -> 00000001
  00011010 -> 10000000
  10111010 -> 10000101
  00010011 -> 11000000
  01100000 -> 00000011
  00110011 -> 11000001

query: 11111100
predicted answer: 00000111
